name: openclawbrain-workspace
description: Public OpenClawBrain TypeScript workspace. The root package is private; publish the scoped packages under packages/.
author: Jonathan Gu <jonathangu@gmail.com>

scripts.release:check: pnpm clean && pnpm check && pnpm release:pack
scripts.release:publish: for pkg in packages/contracts packages/events packages/event-export packages/workspace-metadata packages/provenance packages/pack-format packages/activation packages/compiler packages/learner; do (cd "$pkg" && npm publish --access public); done
scripts.release:publish:dry-run: for pkg in packages/contracts packages/events packages/event-export packages/workspace-metadata packages/provenance packages/pack-format packages/activation packages/compiler packages/learner; do (cd "$pkg" && npm publish --access public --dry-run); done
scripts.release:publish:provenance: for pkg in packages/contracts packages/events packages/event-export packages/workspace-metadata packages/provenance packages/pack-format packages/activation packages/compiler packages/learner; do (cd "$pkg" && npm publish --access public --provenance); done
